title: Integrations
subtitle: Authorize trusted services and decide which FullParty events they can receive.
empty: No integration clients have been created yet.

healthcheck_toast.title: Healthcheck complete
healthcheck_toast.description: The latest integration health result is now available.

confirm_regenerate_api_token: Regenerate this API token? The current token will stop working immediately.
confirm_regenerate_webhook_secret: Regenerate this webhook signing secret? The bot must be updated before it can verify new events.

regenerate_api_token_modal.title: Regenerate API token
regenerate_api_token_modal.description: The integration will need the new API token before it can call FullParty again.
regenerate_api_token_modal.warning: The current API token will stop working immediately.

regenerate_webhook_secret_modal.title: Regenerate webhook secret
regenerate_webhook_secret_modal.description: The integration will need the new secret before it can verify events from FullParty.
regenerate_webhook_secret_modal.warning: Events sent with the new secret may fail until the bot is updated.

credentials.title: Credentials for {name}
credentials.description: Store these now. For safety, FullParty will not show the plain values again.

form.description: Use this for trusted services such as the official Discord bot.
